---
title: "<i>Churchman's Family Magazine, The</i>"
---

## <i>Churchman's Family Magazine, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This periodical seems to have run 1863-1873.  The publisher was Hogg. <i>The Clever Woman of the Family </i>was serialized in it (January 1864-April 1865).

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
